team_name: TenderMind AI - Explainable Procurement Intelligence Platform
summary: AI-based tender evaluation and eligibility analysis platform for government procurement, providing explainable evaluations, reducing evaluation time, improving consistency, enhancing fairness, and bringing accountability to the public procurement process.
key_steps: Ingesting bidder submissions in multiple formats
Matching extracted bidder data against the defined criteria
Producing clear verdicts for each bidder
Ensuring transparency and trust with detailed evidence
constraints_addressed: Diverse bidder submissions in multiple formats
